host.note: Local Phase 0 development host; results are not portable performance claims.

kotlinComparison.sourcePolicy: Build the comparison host and Community Kotlin plugin from open-source revisions; do not introduce the unified proprietary IDE binary as a project dependency.
kotlinComparison.reason: Phase 0 has no completion, navigation, diagnostics, or refactoring implementation to compare fairly. The first end-to-end matched-workload run is gated on those Phase 1 feature probes.
